variant: Standard and Wide Base Bay Site Layouts
product_type: Two Post Inground Lift - Bay Site Layout

installation_requirements.vehicle_clearance: Designed for vehicles up to 19 feet in length
installation_requirements.increase_clearance_for_longer_vehicles: 12' 6" increase for specialized vehicles over 19 ft long

features: Bay site layout for shop planning - standard base (TP-30A)
Bay site layout for shop planning - wide base (TP-30-WB)
Accommodates vehicles up to 19 feet in length
Wide base model requires 2 additional feet of bay width (22' vs 20')
notes: Most vehicles' center of gravity (C.O.G.) lie between wheel base centers, however, some vehicles C.O.G. may be offset. Verify the center of gravity on the vehicle fleet to insure rear and front access of the vehicle.
TP-30A standard base requires 20' bay width with 2' 6" between adjacent columns for multi-unit installation
TP-30-WB wide base requires 22' bay width with 2' 7" between adjacent columns for multi-unit installation
Layout dimensions identical to TP-26A and TP-26-WB respectively
Increase bay dimensions for specialized vehicles over 19 ft long
